attributes.action: All pensioners tax code should rise to ensure no tax is paid on state pension.
attributes.additional_details:
Make all pensioners equal
To ensure equal rites for all those drawing state pension (which has been paid for during their working lives). All pensioners tax code should rise with the state pension so that NO pensioner, irrespective of whether they have private pensions or not, pays tax on their state pension.
attributes.background: All pensioners tax code should rise with the state pension so that NO pensioner, irrespective of whether they have private pensions or not, pays tax on their state pension.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Raise the personal tax allowance to the state pension rate" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/746077
